name: flyenv
description: Lightweight Native Local Dev Toolbox for Windows, macOS & Linux. Run  Hermes Agent/OpenClaw/n8n/Apache/Nginx/Caddy/Tomcat/PHP/Node.js/Bun/Deno/Python/Java/Go/Ruby/Perl/Rust/Erlang/MySQL/PostgreSQL/MariaDB/MongoDB/Redis/RabbitMQ/Mailpit/Elasticsearch without Docker. The faster, modular alternative to XAMPP/MAMP/Laravel Herd/NVM/FNM/PHPStudy...
description_ja: Windows、macOS、Linux 向けの軽量なネイティブローカル開発ツールボックス。Docker なしで Hermes Agent/OpenClaw/n8n/Apache/Nginx/Caddy/Tomcat/PHP/Node.js/Bun/Deno/Python/Java/Go/Ruby/Perl/Rust/Erlang/MySQL/PostgreSQL/MariaDB/MongoDB/Redis/RabbitMQ/Mailpit/Elasticsearch を実行可能。XAMPP/MAMP/Laravel Herd/NVM/FNM/PHPStudy の高速でモジュール式の代替ツール。
